# Shields
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Shields&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom shields and old shields that have been edited from how they appear on the production RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Shield
!Damage
!Shots
!Range
!Effect
!Stats
!MP Cost
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal
Effect
|-
|Stardust Buckler
|305-365
|6
|3.2
|Stunned:
3.5 sec
|<nowiki>+12def</nowiki>
+3vit

+3wis
|105
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Head of the Riverborn
|50-115
|5
|4.5
|Stunned:
3.75 sec
|<nowiki>+10def</nowiki>
+40hp
|150
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Shield of Vendettas
|300-350
|6
|3.2
|Berserk:
2 sec

Stunned:

2 sec

Slowed:

2 sec
|<nowiki>+11def</nowiki>
|140
|3%
|Heroic
|
|-
|The Unbreakable Tombstone
|370-595
|4
|3.4
|Armor Broken:
5 sec

Dazed:

5 sec

Stunned:

4.5 sec
|<nowiki>-3att</nowiki>
+13def

+110hp
|135
|6%
|Legendary
|Physical Barrier
|-
|Shield of Ogmur
|300-400
|5
|3.2
|Stunned:
2 sec

Armor Broken:

5 sec
|<nowiki>+14def</nowiki>
+60hp
|100
|6%
|Legendary
|Physical Barrier
|}
